title: senecio selloi
intro: Senecio selloi, also known as Bear's Head, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Senecio selloi include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Senecio selloi can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
